language.title: Choose your language
language.subtitle: Kyra works in English, Hindi, and Kannada. You can change this anytime in your profile.

signup.title: Sign up
signup.subtitle: Kyra is for women, by women. Create your account to get started.
signup.name_required: Please enter your first and last name.

otp.title: Verify your number
otp.instruction: Enter the 6-digit code we sent to {{phone}}.
otp.go_back: Go back and re-enter your details.

selfie.title: Take a selfie
selfie.subtitle: Hold your phone steady. Reviewed once by ops to confirm you're a woman.
selfie.permission_body: We need your camera for a one-time verification selfie. Reviewed only by Kyra ops to confirm you're a woman, never shared.
selfie.submitted_body: Your selfie is in review. You can use Kyra now; ride booking unlocks once an admin approves your account (usually under 24 hours).

pickup.drag_hint: Drag the map to set your pickup point
pickup.label: Pickup point

vehicles.title: Choose your ride
vehicles.fare_unavailable: Could not load route. Showing flat-rate fare.

ride.looking_body: Reading your request — finding the closest driver near you.
ride.assurance: Every Kyra driver is a verified woman. We'll buzz you the moment one accepts.
ride.share_otp: SHARE THIS OTP WITH YOUR DRIVER
ride.otp_sub: Driver only starts the ride after you tell them this code.
ride.waiting_hint: Driver will end the ride when you reach. Sit back, hydrate.
ride.is_driver_woman_body:
Look at the driver who pulled up.
Is the driver a woman?
A "No" will cancel this ride immediately and flag the driver for review.
ride.trip_starting: Both confirmed. Your driver is starting the trip now.
ride.in_progress_banner: Trip in progress. Stay seated and reach your drop safely.

profile.title: Profile
profile.sign_out_body: You will be asked to verify your phone again next time.

rides.title: My rides
rides.empty_hint: Book your first ride from the home tab. Past rides will show up here so you can rate or re-rate them anytime.

driver_welcome.slide1_title:
Earn safely.
Drive on your terms.
driver_welcome.slide1_body: Kyra is a women-only mobility platform. Flexible hours, transparent fares, real safety.
driver_welcome.slide2_body: Choose what you drive. Auto-rickshaw or bike-taxi — own or Kyra-leased. We support both.
driver_welcome.slide3_body: Rider and driver are both verified women. Phone OTP + selfie + KYC docs — every account, every time.

driver_register.title: Driver registration
driver_register.subtitle: We'll need a few quick things to set up your driver account.
driver_register.whatsapp_label: Receive ride alerts and account updates on
driver_register.verified_note: Kyra is women-only on both sides. You'll verify with Aadhaar + selfie before you can go online.

driver_vehicle.title: Vehicle details
driver_vehicle.subtitle: Tell us what you drive. You can update this later if you switch vehicles.
driver_vehicle.reg_help: RTO format — uppercase letters and numbers, no spaces.

upload_doc.permission_body: Kyra needs your camera to capture your document. We never share or sell your photos — they're reviewed by Kyra ops only and stored encrypted.
upload_doc.submitted_body: {{title}} is now in review. You can keep adding other documents.

driver_online.goal_first: Complete your first ride to start. ₹{{bonus}} bonus unlocks at {{target}}.
driver_online.goal_more: {{remaining}} more rides to unlock the ₹{{bonus}} bonus.
driver_online.goal_more_one: 1 more ride to unlock the ₹{{bonus}} bonus.
driver_online.goal_done: Bonus unlocked. Will be paid with your next payout.
driver_online.permission_body: Kyra needs your location to match you with nearby riders. Open Settings → Kyra Driver → Location → Allow While Using App.
driver_online.offline_body: Flip the switch to start receiving ride requests. Your location is shared only while you're online.
driver_online.pool_empty: No requests yet — keep driving around. Your position pings every 10 seconds while online.
driver_online.pool_visible_body: You're online and visible to riders nearby. New requests will appear here.
driver_online.assign_complete_waiting: Trip complete. Waiting for rider to pay.
driver_online.complete_hint: Confirm the final fare and complete the trip.
driver_online.no_vehicle_body: Add your vehicle in the Document Centre before accepting rides.
driver_online.location_required_body: Kyra needs your location while you are online so riders can match with you and see you arriving.
driver_online.someone_else_took: Someone else may have taken it.
driver_online.you_answered_waiting: You answered {{answer}}. Waiting for the rider…
driver_online.safety_look: Look at the rider in front of you.
driver_online.safety_no_warn: A "No" will cancel this ride immediately.

nav_pickup.title: Navigate to pickup
nav_pickup.safety_hint: At pickup you and the rider will both confirm each other is a woman. Trip only starts after both confirm.

enter_otp.stage1_subtitle: Ask the rider for her 4-digit Kyra OTP. Trip only starts once it matches.
enter_otp.mismatch: That OTP doesn't match. Ask the rider to read it again.
enter_otp.check_body:
Look at the rider getting in your vehicle.
Is the rider a woman?
A "No" will cancel this ride immediately and flag the rider for review.
enter_otp.both_required: The rider is also being asked the same question about you. Both answers must be yes for the trip to start.

in_ride.title: On trip
in_ride.sos_hint: Triple-press volume down to silently trigger SOS during the ride.
in_ride.modal_sub: Adjust the fare if it changed (toll, waiting, etc.) — the rider will be asked to pay this amount.
in_ride.invalid_fare: Final fare must be greater than 0.

rate_rider.title: Rate the rider
rate_rider.history_hint: You can change this anytime from the History section in your profile.

sos.confirm_body: Hold the button for 1.5 seconds to alert Kyra safety.
sos.confirmed_body: Kyra safety has your location. Stay on the line if you can — call 112 if you are in immediate danger.
sos.error_body: Network or location error. Try again, and call 112 if you are in immediate danger.

city.subtitle: Kyra is launching in Bengaluru first. Other cities are on our roadmap.

driving_license.title: Upload your DL
driving_license.subtitle: Auto and bike-taxi both need a valid commercial DL (with PSV badge for bike-taxi). We'll OCR the details and you can correct anything that's off.
driving_license.front_hint: Make sure your name and DL number are readable.
driving_license.back_hint: Upload even if it looks blank — RTO endorsements live there.
driving_license.tip1: Hold your phone flat above the DL — no angle.
driving_license.tip2: Use natural light, no flash glare.
driving_license.tip3: Crop tight to the card edges.

coming_soon.default_body: This part of the driver app is being rewritten against the new backend.
